title: taraxacum pateriforme
intro: Taraxacum pateriforme, also known as the Alpine Daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are thought to contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Taraxacum pateriforme may include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
